input.query: Assess a managed platform integration provider that will connect ServiceNow, procurement, finance approvals, and SharePoint policy repositories.

documents.title: Statement of work
documents.summary: SOW defines implementation scope, named integration owners, least-privilege access, change windows, and support SLAs.

documents.title: Continuity and exit plan
documents.summary: Continuity plan includes backup administrators, exit assistance, configuration export, and 30-day transition support.
